text_source: And there were shepherds living out in the fields nearby, keeping watch over their flocks at night.
text_target: Kulikuwa na wachungaji waliokaa mashambani karibu, wakilinda makundi yao usiku.
audio_path: outputs/audio/seg_000.wav  (stub — run full pipeline for real audio)

text_source: An angel of the Lord appeared to them, and the glory of the Lord shone around them, and they were terrified.
text_target: Malaika wa Bwana akawatokea, na utukufu wa Bwana ukawaangazia, nao wakaogopa sana.
audio_path: outputs/audio/seg_001.wav  (stub — run full pipeline for real audio)

text_source: But the angel said to them, 'Do not be afraid. I bring you good news of great joy for all the people.'
text_target: Lakini malaika akawaambia, 'Msiogope. Nawaletea habari njema ya furaha kuu kwa watu wote.'
audio_path: outputs/audio/seg_002.wav  (stub — run full pipeline for real audio)

text_source: Today in the town of David a Savior has been born to you; he is the Messiah, the Lord.
text_target: Leo katika mji wa Daudi mmezaliwa Mwokozi; yeye ni Bwana.
audio_path: outputs/audio/seg_003.wav  (stub — run full pipeline for real audio)

text_source: Glory to God in the highest heaven, and on earth peace to those on whom his favor rests.
text_target: Utukufu kwa Mungu juu mbinguni, na duniani amani kwa wale anaowapenda.
audio_path: outputs/audio/seg_004.wav  (stub — run full pipeline for real audio)

text_source: This is the good news about Jesus the Christ, the Son of God.
text_target: Hii ni habari njema kuhusu Yesu Kristo, Mwana wa Mungu.
audio_path: outputs/audio/seg_005.wav  (stub — run full pipeline for real audio)
